dependencies: Single smelter dependency in Indonesia for PT-FI operations
Concentration of copper concentrate processing at Miami smelter for North America operations
Reliance on third-party power suppliers for electricity
Dependence on diesel fuel for mine trucks and transportation equipment
Water supply dependencies in arid regions
Long-lead times for consumables including fuel, lubricants, ammonium nitrate and sulfuric acid
risks: Supply chain disruptions from geopolitical tensions, regulatory changes in Indonesia, energy supply constraints, transportation logistics for remote operations, reliance on third-party smelters and refiners, concentrate export restrictions
Supplier failure to meet quality, quantity, cost requirements or technical specifications
Interruptions from fire, power shortages, industrial accidents, cybersecurity attacks, natural disasters or extreme weather events
Supply chain disruptions from geopolitical tensions
Longer lead times on delivery of consumables
